title: If You Come Along @P
lyrics: Do I love for more? Do I love for answers inside? Do I know what I like and hide? Do I just sit back and ride? Do I glide with you? Do I wonder if I wait for you? Making a move with me?   Telling me you're free for a lovely evening. Kind of like baby, dinner, TV. Eating grass waves in the wind. Hand over my friend. Can I hold up for a little bit? Let me show you my drift, hey. Baby, when you come with me, we can be free. It can just be you and me, yeah. We can be just us tonight. No one has to know what we want to do. It can be just me and you, dancing in the moonlight. I know it's hard. Too much and too much and too far. And just have for me. And I know that you can't go that far again. I don't say we can't be more than friends. I'm just saying maybe it's a trend. Think about the world when it goes. Think about it all and just relax a second. Relax a second and escape. Let your mind go. Let your mind free. Let it all come and be a part of something new, a part of something free. Baby, it's ecstasy, hey. When you come with me, no. Baby, it's you and me. I don't care what they say. I don't care if they tell me to go. No, it's you and me. You and me tonight. We can be free skiing. Just can't lie. It's just the moment of the day. I know that the night is hot. And I know that it lets you start. And I don't want to repeat anything that you've done before. I want to show you some more. I want to love you. Like you've never been found out before. I'm rocked down again. I'm talking about questions of eternity. Conversation knocks your left out loud. Knocks your breath out loud. Makes you say out loud. Makes you exclaim. Tonight is our night.  Baby, when you come with me, you know we can be free. We can float on ecstasy in the moon glow. Dancing in the moonlight. Dancing in the moon, you know. We can be there. I don't even know what we do. But for starters, maybe we talk all night and find something blue. To be put in with. To be more than that. To have a little escape and be more than that. Who knows what tomorrow brings? But I know that you are the fire that ignites the night. The fire that ignites the night. I'm rooting for you. I'm wishing for you, man. www.mooji.org www.mooji.org
